public-home-loads.name: Landing page loads
public-home-loads.description: Albunmanía landing renders hero + CTAs, sponsor splash/header band mount, banner slot and footer disclaimer present

auth-google-signin.name: Sign in with Google
auth-google-signin.description: Sign-in page renders Google OAuth button + hCaptcha; exchange validates account age (>=30 days) and issues JWT cookies

auth-google-signup.name: Sign up with Google
auth-google-signup.description: Sign-up page renders Google OAuth + hCaptcha; get-or-create user then redirect to onboarding

auth-hcaptcha-gate.name: hCaptcha gate on auth pages
auth-hcaptcha-gate.description: hCaptcha widget fetches the sitekey and mounts on /sign-in and /sign-up; token required before Google submission

auth-onboarding-wizard.name: 3-step onboarding wizard
auth-onboarding-wizard.description: Onboarding: pick active album, grant geolocation, set push/whatsapp prefs; saves Profile then redirect to dashboard

auth-guest-browse.name: Browse as guest
auth-guest-browse.description: Guest can browse landing, catalog, merchants and manual without login; trade actions prompt login

auth-protected-redirect.name: Protected route redirect
auth-protected-redirect.description: Unauthenticated user on /dashboard or /admin redirected to /sign-in; role-mismatched user redirected to /dashboard

auth-session-persistence.name: Session persistence (cookies)
auth-session-persistence.description: JWT stored in cookies survives reload; access token refreshed via /api/token/refresh/ when expired

auth-sign-out.name: Sign out
auth-sign-out.description: Authenticated user clicks 'Cerrar sesión' (Header or /dashboard); authStore.signOut() clears the JWT cookies and the auth guard sends them to /sign-in

catalog-grid-filters.name: Browse catalog + filters/search
catalog-grid-filters.description: Catalog grid renders one card per sticker; team/number/player/special filters and server-side search narrow results. The availability + proximity-radius filters have their own flow (catalog-availability-proximity).

catalog-inventory-tap.name: Inventory 0/1/2+ tap + sync
catalog-inventory-tap.description: Tap increments data-count (missing -> owned -> repeated); long-press resets; bulk sync POSTs after ~2s debounce

catalog-special-edition.name: Special-edition badge + filter
catalog-special-edition.description: Special-edition filter narrows the grid to flagged stickers; each renders the golden ★ badge

match-swipe-feed.name: Match swipe feed renders
match-swipe-feed.description: /match shows swipe/mine tabs and the nearby candidate cards (bbox + haversine, complementary inventory, review preview)

match-like-mutual.name: Like -> mutual match
match-like-mutual.description: Like POSTs /api/match/like/ with {to_user, sticker_offered, sticker_wanted}; mirror Like -> mutual modal + push

match-list-mine.name: My matches list
match-list-mine.description: The 'mine' tab lists existing mutual matches, each linking to /match/<id>

match-qr-mine.name: My QR code (share lists)
match-qr-mine.description: /match/qr 'Mi QR' tab fetches a signed HMAC token (TTL 24h) and renders the QR SVG; shareable available/wanted lists

match-qr-scan-confirm.name: Scan QR -> cross lists offline -> confirm
match-qr-scan-confirm.description: Scanner mounts (or camera-error fallback); scan returns counterpart inventory; computeOfflineCross runs client-side; confirm re-runs server-side and creates Trade

match-detail-trade.name: Match/trade detail view
match-detail-trade.description: /match/[matchId] renders trade items, WhatsApp opt-in toggle, review mini-block; 'Calificar' CTA after completion

match-shared-list-view.name: View a shared QR list
match-shared-list-view.description: Guest opens /share/[token]?kind=available|wanted (shared from /match/qr); GET /api/trade/share/<token>/ renders the collector's cromos grid (special editions highlighted) + a 'Únete a Albunmanía' CTA; expired/invalid token shows the error state

whatsapp-optin-per-trade.name: Per-trade WhatsApp opt-in -> wa.me link
whatsapp-optin-per-trade.description: Per-trade opt-in checkbox; link disabled until both sides opt in, then wa.me deep link with server-side template

merchant-public-list-map.name: Merchant public list + Leaflet map
merchant-public-list-map.description: /merchants lists active-subscription merchants, city filter narrows, Leaflet map (ssr:false) mounts

merchant-dashboard-edit.name: Merchant self-service dashboard
merchant-dashboard-edit.description: /merchants/me pre-populated form + subscription badge; PATCH /api/merchants/me/ saves edits with confirmation

merchant-admin-promote-pay.name: Admin promotes merchant + registers payment
merchant-admin-promote-pay.description: Admin assigns role=merchant and registers MerchantSubscriptionPayment; listing visible while current

sponsor-splash-header.name: Presenting Sponsor splash + header band
sponsor-splash-header.description: Active sponsor: splash shows ~1800ms then dismisses, header band 'Presentado por ...', CSS vars apply the palette

theme-dark-toggle.name: Dark mode toggle
theme-dark-toggle.description: ThemeToggle menu (Light/Dark/System); selecting Dark adds the 'dark' class to documentElement and persists

ads-banner-serve-click.name: Banner CPM served + click redirect
ads-banner-serve-click.description: GET /api/ads/serve/ records an AdImpression and returns a creative; the slot renders an /api/ads/click/<id>/ link (302 + AdClick)

ads-frequency-cap.name: Banner frequency cap (1 / 5 swipes)
ads-frequency-cap.description: adStore.noteSwipe() requests a feed banner at most once every 5 swipes; no serve call in between

review-post-trade-create.name: Post-trade review (stars + tags + comment)
review-post-trade-create.description: After a completed trade: ★1-5 + tags + comment <=500; POST validates uniqueness (trade, reviewer); 24h editable; signal recomputes Profile aggregates

review-reply.name: Reviewee public reply
review-reply.description: Reviewee posts a single public reply; second attempt -> 409 Conflict

review-profile-summary.name: Review tab + rating summary on profile
review-profile-summary.description: /profile/[id] Reseñas section renders ReviewSummary (avg, 1-5 bars, count, top tags) + the review list with a star filter (GET /api/users/<id>/rating-summary/ + .../reviews/?stars=)

review-drawer.name: Review drawer on Match / trade detail
review-drawer.description: Clicking the compact ★ preview opens a non-blocking side-sheet (never modal, never pre-opened) with a paginated, star-filterable list

review-moderation.name: Admin review-report moderation queue
review-moderation.description: Reports feed the queue; admin hides a review (is_visible=False + reason) -> removed from public/aggregates but kept for audit; reversible

stats-dashboard-tiles.name: Dashboard stat tiles (streak + ETA)
stats-dashboard-tiles.description: StatCard renders %completo, Pegadas, Repetidas, Última semana, Racha (1-day grace), ETA finalización (remaining / weekly_velocity/7)

stats-city-ranking.name: City ranking leaderboard
stats-city-ranking.description: RankingList shows top collectors in the user's city for the active album, with empty / empty-config states

push-subscribe.name: Web Push opt-in / unsubscribe
push-subscribe.description: Dashboard PushOptInButton: requestPermission -> public-key -> pushManager.subscribe -> POST /api/push/subscribe/; unsubscribe mirrors

push-match-mutual-delivery.name: Push delivered on mutual match
push-match-mutual-delivery.description: post_save Match signal -> push_notify.send_to -> webpush -> SW push event -> showNotification; notificationclick focuses data.url; 404/410 -> delete subscription

admin-landing-gated.name: Admin landing role-gated
admin-landing-gated.description: /admin renders management tiles for web-manager/admin; collector router.replace('/dashboard'); endpoints also 403

admin-users-roles.name: Admin users — roles + active toggle
admin-users-roles.description: /admin-panel/users lists accounts, search by q; inline role change (string -> User.Role enum, mirrors Group) and active toggle; cannot_block_self

admin-moderation-queue.name: Admin moderation queue
admin-moderation-queue.description: /admin-panel/moderation has two queues: review reports (hide/restore via is_visible) and general reports of users/trades (GET /api/admin/reports/?status=&kind= → PATCH .../<id>/ to dismiss or action + a link to /admin-panel/users)

admin-analytics-overview.name: Admin analytics + KPIs + CSV export
admin-analytics-overview.description: /admin-panel/analytics composite overview (7 blocks: community KPIs, ad KPIs, trend, top offered/wanted, devices, top cities) + CSV export link

manual-search-browse.name: Interactive manual: sections + search
manual-search-browse.description: /manual renders collapsible section buttons (9 sections x 14 processes) + client-side search over keywords/title/summary; ProcessCard bilingual

legal-terms.name: Terms & Conditions page
legal-terms.description: /terminos renders the T&C document (sections from lib/legal/content.ts) + the draft-notice banner; linked from the footer

legal-privacy.name: Privacy Policy page
legal-privacy.description: /privacidad renders the privacy policy (Ley 1581/2012 scope) + the draft-notice banner; linked from the footer

help-faq.name: Help center / FAQ
help-faq.description: /ayuda renders the FAQ accordion (lib/faq/content.ts) with an audience filter (general/coleccionista/comerciante/anunciante); linked from the footer

profile-view.name: Collector profile page
profile-view.description: /profile/[id] renders the public profile (name/city/avatar/bio + reputation + % album + completed trades via GET /api/users/<id>/public-profile/) and the Reseñas section; /profile/me also shows the 'Editar mi cuenta' form (PATCH /api/profile/me/); linked from the Header avatar

notifications-center.name: In-app notification center
notifications-center.description: /notificaciones lists the user's in-app notifications (GET /api/notifications/?unread=), 'sólo no leídas' filter, 'marcar todas como leídas' (POST /read-all/); clicking a notification marks it read (POST /<id>/read/) and navigates to its url. Header bell shows the unread count (GET /api/notifications/unread-count/). Notifications are created on a mutual match and on a review received/replied.

report-user-or-trade.name: Report a user or a trade
report-user-or-trade.description: A 'Reportar' button on /profile/[id] (target=user) and /match/[matchId] (target=trade, e.g. no-show) opens a modal (reason select + detail ≤500) → POST /api/reports/ {target_kind, target_id, reason, detail}. Cannot report yourself; a trade can only be reported by a participant. The report lands in the /admin-panel/moderation general-reports queue.

presence-live-badge.name: Presence — "en línea ahora" Live Badge
presence-live-badge.description: While signed in, PresencePinger heartbeats POST /api/presence/ping/ every 120s (and on tab focus), which bumps Profile.last_seen (throttled). A collector is 'online' if last_seen is within 5 min; the green LiveBadge then shows on /profile/[id], swipe/match cards and the city ranking. The dashboard shows GET /api/presence/active-count/?city= ('N coleccionistas en línea ahora'). validate-token also bumps last_seen.

collectors-map.name: Mapa de Coleccionistas
collectors-map.description: /mapa shows collectors with an approximate location on a Leaflet map (GET /api/collectors/map/?lat=&lng=&radius_km=&album_id=) plus a list with Live Badges and links to /profile/[id]. 'Usar mi ubicación' requests browser geo and refetches within a 50 km radius; 'Ver todos' refetches unscoped. The requester is excluded; only approximate lat/lng are exposed.

catalog-predictive-search.name: Predictive catalogue search (autocomplete dropdown)
catalog-predictive-search.description: On /catalog/[slug] the search bar (SearchAutocomplete) shows a debounced dropdown with sticker suggestions (GET /api/albums/<slug>/search/?q=) and collector suggestions (GET /api/collectors/search/?q=) with a visual preview. Picking a sticker sets the query to its number (the grid filters to it); picking a collector navigates to /profile/[id]. The plain grid-filter behaviour (catalog-grid-filters) is unchanged.

catalog-availability-proximity.name: Catalogue availability + proximity-radius filters
catalog-availability-proximity.description: On /catalog/[slug]: an availability <select> (todos / los que tengo / me faltan / repetidos) → GET /api/albums/<slug>/stickers/?availability=mine|missing|repeated (based on the requester's UserSticker; anonymous → 400). A 'Disponibles cerca' checkbox (+ radius select 10/25/50/100 km) → ?nearby=true&radius_km=... (and lat/lng from the user's Profile, or explicit lat/lng) → keeps only stickers some collector within the radius has to trade (UserSticker.count >= 2; the requester is excluded; 400 if no geo). When the user has no saved location the checkbox is disabled with a hint. Combines with the other filters.

geo-ip-locate.name: IP-based geolocation (GeoIP2)
geo-ip-locate.description: GET /api/geo/ip-locate/ returns {available, located, lat, lng, city, country} from the visitor's IP via a MaxMind GeoLite2 DB. The onboarding step 2 (StepGeolocation) calls it on mount and, if it resolves, offers a one-tap 'usar ubicación aproximada por IP' before the precise browser-geolocation prompt. When the .mmdb isn't provisioned the endpoint returns {available:false} and the wizard falls back to the browser API only.
